name: King Linen Bed Skirt White - Casaluna™
description:
This King Linen Bedskirt from Casaluna™ will instantly give your bed a neat finish. Made from cotton-linen blend fabric, the woven bedskirt adds a chic look to your bed while concealing the under-bed storage. Featuring a 15-inch drop length, the white bedskirt drapes beautifully and complements any bedding style. Plus, it's machine washable for quick and easy cleaning.

Casaluna™: Where calm and comfort are naturally at home.
